title: Next.js on Android — Development Guide | Acode
description: Build Next.js applications on your Android phone with Acode. Create Next.js projects, run dev servers, and deploy — all from Acode's Alpine Linux terminal and code editor.
heroHeadline: Build Next.js Apps on Your Android Phone
heroSubheadline: Acode lets you create and develop Next.js applications directly on Android. Node.js, npm, terminal, and JSX/TSX editor — everything you need to build with Next.js on the go.
problemHeadline: Next.js Development Needs a Desktop — Until Now
problemPoints: Next.js is the most popular React framework — but it requires Node.js, npm, and a terminal. These are desktop tools. Running a Next.js dev server on a phone has been impossible without a real development environment.
You can edit Next.js files in a text editor, but you can't run them. You can't npm run dev. You can't see your pages. You can't use the App Router. Editing blind isn't development.
solutionPoints: Acode's terminal runs Node.js and npm. Create a Next.js app: npx create-next-app@latest. Start the dev server: npm run dev. Preview in Acode's browser. All on your phone.
Enjoy full JSX/TSX syntax highlighting for your Next.js components, pages, and API routes. App Router and Pages Router both supported.
setupHeadline: Create a Next.js App on Acode

setupSteps.title: Install Acode & Terminal
setupSteps.description: Download Acode, set up the Alpine Linux terminal.

setupSteps.title: Create Next.js Project
setupSteps.description: Run: npx create-next-app@latest my-next-app — choose your preferences (TypeScript, ESLint, Tailwind, App Router).

setupSteps.title: Start Dev Server
setupSteps.description: Run: cd my-next-app && npm run dev. Open the localhost URL in Acode's browser.

setupSteps.title: Edit & Preview
setupSteps.description: Edit pages in Acode's editor. Changes appear instantly with hot reload via Next.js's Fast Refresh.

features.title: App Router Support
features.description: Build with Next.js App Router. Server Components, layouts, loading states, and route handlers — all developable on your phone.

features.title: API Routes
features.description: Create and test API routes directly. Run the dev server and test endpoints from Acode's browser.

features.title: TypeScript Support
features.description: Next.js with TypeScript works great on Acode. TSX syntax highlighting in the editor.

features.title: Tailwind CSS
features.description: Install the Tailwind plugin for Acode to get IntelliSense for Tailwind classes in your Next.js components.
